title: Sonne Finance - Rekt
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donation attack on Compound v2 fork

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sets collateral factor on a market contract after a governance proposal activation.

red_flags: Single transaction containing governance proposal activation and attack payload
Collateral factor set to 35% enabling large withdrawals
summary: Sonne Finance lost $20 million due to a flash loan followed by a donation attack on a Compound v2 fork. A guard could have blocked the transaction by preventing the setting of a low collateral factor after a governance proposal activation.
